name: python-patterns
description: Evaluations for python-patterns skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user explicitly requests Python best practices or patterns

prompts.input: Help me write idiomatic Python code for this function
prompts.reason: Requesting idiomatic Python — core use case of this skill

prompts.input: How should I use type hints in Python for this class?
prompts.reason: Type hints are a key focus of this skill

prompts.input: Refactor this Python code to follow PEP 8 and best practices
prompts.reason: PEP 8 and Python best practices are covered by this skill

prompts.input: What is the Pythonic way to handle exceptions in this code?
prompts.reason: Pythonic exception handling patterns are covered by this skill

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for general programming requests unrelated to Python patterns

prompts.input: How do I install Python on my machine?
prompts.reason: Installation question, not about Python coding patterns

prompts.input: Explain what a for loop does
prompts.reason: Basic programming concept explanation, not Python-specific best practices
